mainline.stage1_definition: stage1 component datasets label horizon = t+20
mainline.stage2_definition: stage2 final yield dataset label horizon = t+20

legacy.purpose: Baseline/legacy datasets kept for comparison only; not the mainline training target.
legacy.canonical_only: Only one canonical legacy baseline is allowed per horizon in the primary output directory. Any duplicate versions produced by spec-drift validation must not remain under outputs/datasets/ (move to outputs/experiments/validation/).

feature_roles.notes: Role classification rules live in src/modeling_dataset.py::export_feature_registry(). Do not change roles without bumping spec_version.
